display.purpose: Landing hero headline. One per page. Space Grotesk for geometric authority.

headline.purpose: Stock page primary title, major section anchors.

title.purpose: Section headers, modal titles, prominent card titles.

label.purpose: Metric labels, table column headers, status badges. Uppercase ≤4 words only.

mono.purpose: DCF projections, price series, financial ratios. tabular-nums always.

shadows.name: glass-card-light
shadows.purpose: Primary card surface on light zone. White inset seam is the tactile signature.

shadows.name: glass-card-dark
shadows.purpose: Cards within the deep frame zone.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Fallback when backdrop-filter is unsupported. Not a design default.

shadows.name: glow-sm
shadows.purpose: Blueprint Blue focus halo. Primary buttons and active nav items.

motion.name: ease-out-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions and reveals.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Entrance animations — fast in, slow settle.

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Default transition duration for state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The only button that leads with color. Used once per action group.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; gap: 6px; background: #2563EB; color: #ffffff; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(37,99,235,0.2), 0 0 4px rgba(37,99,235,0.1); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; user-select: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #60A5FA; box-shadow: 0 0 24px rgba(37,99,235,0.3), 0 0 8px rgba(37,99,235,0.12); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #2563EB; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(37,99,235,0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action in the dark frame. Transparent background with blue-tinted border.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; gap: 6px; background: transparent; color: #CBD5E1; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap; border: 1px solid rgba(59,130,246,0.3); border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; user-select: none; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border-color: rgba(59,130,246,0.5); color: #ffffff; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #2563EB; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(37,99,235,0.4); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary action. No background, no border. Used for icon triggers and low-priority actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; gap: 6px; background: transparent; color: #94A3B8; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; user-select: none; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: #ffffff; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #2563EB; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(37,99,235,0.4); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Transparent ground, stroke-defined. 8px radius. Shifts to blue ring on focus.
components.css: .ds-input-wrapper { display: flex; align-items: center; width: 100%; } .ds-input { height: 32px; width: 100%; padding: 0 10px; background: transparent; color: #0F172A; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1; border: 1px solid #E2E8F0; border-radius: 8px; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #94A3B8; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #2563EB; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(37,99,235,0.25); } .ds-input:disabled { pointer-events: none; opacity: 0.5; background: rgba(226,232,240,0.5); }

components.name: Glass Card (Light)
components.description: Primary card on the light page surface. Frosted white with white hairline seam — the tactile signature.
components.html:
Fair Value Estimate
Based on 10-year DCF model
$142.50
components.css: .ds-card-light { position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; padding: 16px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.62); backdrop-filter: blur(28px) saturate(200%) brightness(1.05); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(28px) saturate(200%) brightness(1.05); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.72); border-top-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.90); border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.95) inset, 0 4px 24px rgba(99,102,241,0.08), 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); transition: box-shadow 200ms ease, transform 200ms ease; overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-light::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 6%; right: 6%; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.65) 20%, rgba(255,255,255,0.90) 50%, rgba(255,255,255,0.65) 80%, transparent 100%); z-index: 1; pointer-events: none; } .ds-card-light:hover { box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.95) inset, 0 8px 32px rgba(99,102,241,0.12), 0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.07); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-card-header { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; color: #0F172A; } .ds-card-description { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 400; color: #64748B; } .ds-card-body { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ds-card-metric { font-family: 'DM Mono', 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 500; color: #0F172A; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

components.name: Glass Card (Dark Frame)
components.description: Card within the deep frame zone. Deep navy glass treatment.
components.css: .ds-card-dark { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; padding: 16px; background: rgba(10,22,40,0.50); backdrop-filter: blur(28px) saturate(200%); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(28px) saturate(200%); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.10); border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(59,130,246,0.06), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.07); color: #F8FAFC; } .ds-card-dark-title { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; color: #F8FAFC; } .ds-card-dark-sub { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: #94A3B8; }

components.name: Status Chip (Positive)
components.description: Semantic badge for undervalued / positive signals. Always paired with a directional label — never color alone.
components.html: Undervalued
components.css: .ds-chip-positive { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; background: #ECFDF5; color: #065F46; border: 1px solid #A7F3D0; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.02em; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Status Chip (Negative)
components.description: Semantic badge for overvalued / negative signals. Always paired with a directional label.
components.html: Overvalued
components.css: .ds-chip-negative { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; background: #FEF2F2; color: #991B1B; border: 1px solid #FECACA; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.02em; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Status Chip (Warning)
components.description: Semantic badge for fair-value / caution signals.
components.css: .ds-chip-warn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; background: #FFFBEB; color: #92400E; border: 1px solid #FDE68A; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.02em; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Bottom Navigation
components.description: iOS Liquid Glass bottom tab bar. Five items, active state in Blueprint Blue. Mobile only.
components.html: HomeAnalyzeMarketsWatchlistAccount
components.css: .ds-bottom-nav { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-around; padding: 8px 0 max(8px, env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.82); backdrop-filter: blur(40px) saturate(210%) brightness(1.05); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(40px) saturate(210%) brightness(1.05); border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.80); box-shadow: 0 -1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.95) inset, 0 -4px 24px rgba(99,102,241,0.06), 0 -1px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); } .ds-bottom-nav::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 4%; right: 4%; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.65) 20%, rgba(255,255,255,0.95) 50%, rgba(255,255,255,0.65) 80%, transparent 100%); pointer-events: none; z-index: 1; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 3px; min-width: 44px; min-height: 44px; padding: 4px 8px; color: #94A3B8; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms ease; } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: #64748B; } .ds-nav-active { color: #2563EB; } .ds-nav-icon { flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-nav-label { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.06em; line-height: 1; text-transform: uppercase; }

narrative.overview:
Intrinsico's visual system is built around a single premise: every screen is a deliverable. Not a dashboard to glance at — a research brief to read, trust, and act on. The design translates institutional-quality valuation analysis into a structured, direct artifact: hierarchical, confident, with nothing decorative standing between the investor and the signal.

The UI operates in two physical zones. The light content zone — white cards on cool slate (#F1F5F9) — is where analysis lives: DCF tables, fair value estimates, company overviews. The deep frame zone — navigation and chrome in near-black navy (#050D1F) — holds the UI together without competing. The two zones are unified by a single accent: Blueprint Blue (#2563EB), used sparingly and with intent. Elevation is expressed through iOS Liquid Glass — frosted planes, blur, white hairline highlights — giving surfaces physical presence without adding decorative mass.

This system explicitly rejects four fintech aesthetic families: Bloomberg Terminal density, Robinhood gamification, generic SaaS dashboard conventions, and traditional broker portal fatigue.
keyCharacteristics: Two-zone system (light content / deep frame) unified by a single accent blue
Glass layering as the primary elevation system: blur depth, opacity, and white highlight seams
Space Grotesk display + Inter body: geometric confidence paired with analytical precision
Financial semantics (up/down/warn) always carry a non-color indicator
Motion is purposeful — state feedback, scroll reveals, and entrances only
Mono numbers in tabular financial data; Inter everywhere else

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Blueprint Blue is the only color with UI authority. Cyan, green, red, and amber are semantic data colors — they describe what the numbers mean. They never carry navigation, CTA, or branding roles.

rules.name: The Cool Ground Rule
rules.body: The page background stays at #F1F5F9. The warm-neutral band is the AI default of 2026. Intrinsico runs on cool slate.

rules.name: The Mono Number Rule
rules.body: Tabular numerical data renders in DM Mono with tabular-nums. Body copy and labels stay in Inter. Never mixed.

rules.name: The Scale Rule
rules.body: Hero/display ceiling is clamp(2rem, 5.5vw, 4.25rem). Financial users are not here to admire typography — they are reading to decide.

rules.name: The Glass-First Rule
rules.body: New components on the light surface use glass-card-light. New components in the dark frame use glass-card. Legacy flat card shadow is a fallback, not a design choice.

rules.name: The Purposeful Glass Rule
rules.body: Glass is structural, not decorative. Applied to elements that do not need elevation separation, it is glassmorphism — prohibited.

dos: Use Blueprint Blue (#2563EB) as the sole navigation and CTA accent color.
Pair all color-coded financial values with a directional icon or explicit text label.
Render tabular financial data in DM Mono with font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums.
Use glass-card-light for new cards on the page-ground surface, glass-card in the dark frame.
Express elevation through blur depth and glass opacity.
Include @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) alternatives for every animation.
Use text-wrap: balance on h1–h3 and text-wrap: pretty on analysis prose.
donts: Don't design toward Bloomberg Terminal density: hierarchy-free data walls with no primary call to attention.
Don't use Robinhood-style gamification: animated tickers, green confetti, casino energy.
Don't use generic SaaS dashboard conventions: hero-metric templates, identical card grids, tiny tracked uppercase eyebrows above every section.
Don't echo traditional broker portal aesthetics: heavy legacy tables, bureaucratic shells, zero visual rhythm.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Blueprint Blue doesn't need to glow.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe on cards, list items, or callouts.
Don't warm the page background. Intrinsico runs on #F1F5F9.
Don't promote semantic colors (green, red, amber) to navigation or CTA roles.
Don't apply glass treatment to decorative elements that do not need elevation separation.
Don't use glow-md or glow-lg on interactive components.
